title: Liptovský Mikuláš, Žilina Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Liptovský Mikuláš, Žilina Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Liptovský Mikuláš is a city in Žilina Region with a population of 31,000. A picturesque town in the Liptov region, a popular tourist destination with access to the Low Tatras, the Demänovská Ice Cave, and the Liptovská Mara reservoir.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
